stories.title: No one wanted to play, but England helped deliver ...
stories.summary: Neither England nor France hoped to be playing for bronze. But the end result was one of the zaniest matches in World Cup history.

stories.title: Player ratings: Bukayo Saka gets 9/10 as England b...
stories.summary: Bukayo Saka was the star of the show as England secured third place at the World Cup with a win over France.

stories.title: England hold off France to win all-time WC thrille...
stories.summary: Bukayo Saka's hat trick helped England survive a dramatic second-half comeback to beat France 6-4 in Saturday's chaotic third-place playoff.

stories.title: Mbappé equals Messi's all-time WCup goal record
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé has leapfrogged Lionel Messi on the all-time World Cup goal-scoring chart as he scored his 21st and 22nd career goals in the tournament.

stories.title: Red Sox's streak hits 12 after 4-run rally vs. Ray...
stories.summary: The Red Sox rallied from a 6-3 deficit Saturday to beat the Rays and extend their winning streak to 12 games.
